notes: Reviewed EN batch for remaining procedural anomaly runtime strings.

entries.gt_78b53b60e47eb2: Wet cloth protects your throat, but water drains faster.
entries.gt_8427322a1761fc: Smog source shut off. The corridors are visible again.
entries.gt_9107f0e2bef245: The marker is already torn off. Silence no longer holds this block.
entries.gt_a19595057e4ce4: Cough cuts your throat: -${hpLoss} HP. Shut off the source or detour.
entries.gt_be68afb332c7a9: The filter dulls the smog, but the path is still murky.
entries.gt_bee1cd8b52eb4d: You spread word of the quiet block. The shelter is no longer yours to decide.
entries.gt_c3eb214ee0317a: The jump screen shudders. Need a lift map, access order, or active radio.
entries.gt_db022e1fad8b6b: The black palm mark is sealed under lacquer. Need a cleaning kit or jackhammer.
entries.gt_db4696ed152562: Mark torn off. The quiet block got loud; the cache stayed someone else's.
entries.gt_e7175c939a3f48: Smog source shut off bare-handed. Throat and skin will remember.
entries.gt_ec518cec0e0c31: The board is silent: the siren is not networked here. Under the clean floor: a cult mark and someone else's cache.
entries.gt_ecacf1aa254988: Cloth wetted and pressed to your face. The smog is more tolerable.
entries.gt_f6c623df2abc64: Jump anchored. This cell pair no longer tears the route.
